text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Suzuka, Fukukitaru! What kinda 
birthday presents did ya get me?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think you're supposed to ask about 
your own presents… but I did get you one.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And I… got you a present multiplying charm!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
A multiplying charm? What's that? 
Anyway, Taiki, here's your present…

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hrngh, and now for the multiplying effect! 
Multiple dupitle, give me an armful♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Taiki, we've been answered! Today, you have 
special permission to hug Suzuka as much 
as you like!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Suzuka, you don't mind? My birthday 
present just got multiplied!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wh-What? That's… Well, okay. 
Just for a bit, then…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
…Oh, that's right. Can I use 
my runny-run charm, then?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Taiki, however much you hug me, 
you get to hug Fukukitaru three times 
as much afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat? That's no fair, Suzuka! 
Hnnghh, in that case…

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's all three of us have a big hug festival♪ 
Praise be, praise be! Wahoo! Hawoo!
